migrationPolicy.adopterAction: Use the middleware matrix as the migration checklist before switching HTTP traffic from Gin or go-zero services.
migrationPolicy.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the existing Gin or go-zero middleware chain active until JWT, CORS, CSRF, session, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, SSE, WebSocket, OpenAPI, and smoke gates pass locally.

Gin.auth: gin middleware that validates Authorization maps to rest.BearerAuthMiddleware or examples/middlewares.JWTMiddleware
Gin.cors: gin-contrib/cors settings map to rest.CORSConfig origins, headers, credentials, and max age
Gin.csrf: gin CSRF or custom double-submit middleware maps to rest.CSRFConfig cookie/header/TTL/SameSite
Gin.session: gin session store maps to signed HttpOnly session cookies or an injected session middleware before auth
Gin.observability: Gin metrics/tracing middleware maps to MetricsMiddleware, PrometheusMetricsHandler, and TraceMiddleware
Gin.realtime: Gin SSE/WebSocket handlers map to rest.Context.SSE and rest.Context.WebSocket with explicit bounds

go-zero.auth: go-zero JWT/AuthInterceptor policy maps to rest.BearerAuthMiddleware and route OpenAPI security metadata
go-zero.cors: go-zero rest CORS config maps to rest.CORSConfig and must preserve credentialed preflight behavior
go-zero.csrf: go-zero custom browser-safety middleware maps to rest.CSRFConfig before state-changing handlers
go-zero.session: go-zero custom session middleware maps to signed HttpOnly cookies or an injected session middleware before auth
go-zero.observability: go-zero trace/log/prometheus handlers map to TraceMiddleware, LogMiddleware, MetricsMiddleware, and /metrics
go-zero.realtime: go-zero streaming/custom upgrade endpoints map to SSE/WebSocket routes with cancellation and size limits

failureModes: JWT rejects missing or invalid Authorization with a stable unauthenticated error envelope
CORS preflight preserves allowed origins, credential behavior, and exposed request-id headers
CSRF rejects missing, mismatched, or expired double-submit tokens before handlers mutate state
Session cookies stay signed, HttpOnly, SameSite, and do not silently downgrade production Secure policy
Prometheus metrics use bounded route labels and keep /metrics scrape output stable
OpenTelemetry propagates traceparent and keeps request-id correlation visible in responses
SSE keeps text/event-stream headers, event IDs, request cancellation, and trace correlation
WebSocket upgrades enforce max message bytes, read/write timeouts, and manager stats
productionDefaults: replace demo JWT, CSRF, and session secrets with secret-manager values
use exact CORS origins when credentials are enabled
keep CSRF and session cookies Secure on HTTPS production deployments
run metrics, tracing, request-id, and structured logging before handler-specific middleware
keep SSE and WebSocket routes authenticated when streams expose user data
keep old Gin or go-zero middleware active until smoke gates and OpenAPI/schema evidence pass

migration.adopterAction: Map bearer token validation to rest.BearerAuthMiddleware and expose the secured route in OpenAPI before switching traffic.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous auth middleware chain active when JWT validation, OpenAPI security metadata, or smoke tests fail.

migration.adopterAction: Port allowed origins, headers, methods, credentials, and exposed headers into rest.CORSConfig before switching browser traffic.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous CORS layer when preflight headers or credential behavior diverge from production samples.

migration.adopterAction: Port token cookie, header, TTL, SameSite, Secure, and HttpOnly policy into rest.CSRFConfig before enabling state-changing routes.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous CSRF layer when token issuance, validation, or browser cookie policy fails smoke coverage.

migration.adopterAction: Keep signed session cookies HttpOnly and SameSite, then expose session-dependent route behavior in middleware smoke tests.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous session implementation when cookie signing, renewal, or route session propagation differs from production.

migration.adopterAction: Expose request counters and latency metrics on /metrics and keep scrape labels low-cardinality before replacing existing metrics middleware.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous metrics endpoint when Prometheus output, route labels, or smoke checks drift.

migration.adopterAction: Propagate traceparent headers through the gofly middleware chain and verify OpenAPI/catalog exposure before traffic shift.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous tracing middleware when trace propagation or span labeling differs from production samples.

migration.adopterAction: Verify text/event-stream headers, request correlation, and cancellation behavior before moving event streams to gofly.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous SSE endpoint when stream headers, event IDs, or cancellation behavior fails smoke coverage.

migration.adopterAction: Verify upgrade handling, message-size bounds, timeouts, and manager stats before replacing existing WebSocket routes.
migration.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous WebSocket endpoint when upgrade behavior, bounds, or connection stats diverge.
